creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
Request: I2P software
with I2P router http://echelon.i2p/ with cleannet http://echelon.i2p.us/
iMule is aMule fork site: with I2P router http://imule.i2p

I2P Bitcoin client
http://echelon.i2p/btci2p/
https://github.com/VirtualDestructor/bitcoin-qt-i2p

I2Phex is Phex for I2P: with I2P router http://echelon.i2p/i2phex/

OurFileSystem: with I2P router http://echelon.i2p/ofs/
http://sourceforge.net/projects/ourfilesystem/

I2Pmessenger QT:
http://echelon.i2p/qti2pmessenger

GarliCat:
http://www.cypherpunk.at/ocat/download/Source/0.2.0/unofficial
http://echelon.i2p/garlicat

Robert torrent client:
http://echelon.i2p/robert/

PyBit bittorrent client
http://echelon.i2p/pybit/


Also will be good update I2P routers http://i2p-projekt.i2p/en/download
